hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'git commit'; then bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/check-doc-terms.sh" || exit 2; bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/check-subset-sync.sh" || exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command' 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'git commit'; then if git diff-tree --no-commit-id --name-only -r HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^docs/sphinx/'; then bash "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/scripts/deploy-docs.sh"; fi; fi
